summary: Raw press gaggle: Trump walks through the East Wing modernization construction site (rebar, scaffolding, hard-hatted workers) giving off-the-cuff remarks about the project, with a 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470' White House lower-third. Handheld single-camera footage with a continuous talking transcript and no music or genre styling. Out of scope: a lightly-edited speech/gaggle, not a music-driven cinematic montage.
notable_text: TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
